title: Cops Widen Probe Into 'Four-Acre' Land Deal In Shirdi Involving 'Godman' Ashok Kharat, Rohit Pawar Demands ED Action
description: Recognizing the vast scale of Kharat’s influence within the Shirdi and Rahata talukas, investigators have now expanded their scrutiny to include four additional financial institutions including Rahata Peoples, Buldhana Urban, Sant Nagebaba, and Swami Vivekananda Credit Societies.
